name: The Papas
description:
🜏 || It's almost time for the annual satanic ball... who will you choose to dance with? It seems they're all interested.



SFW intro / all gender

It seems like you're a favorite this year and each Papa has offered you a dance... but who will you give the honor of dancing with?

| Ghost |

Also, no initial message here like I usually do because it's ridiculously long. Sorry! 😂🫣

Tags: Papa Emeritus I, Primo, Papa Emeritus II, Secondo, Papa Emeritus III, Terzo, Papa Emeritus IV, Copia, Frater Imperator, Cardinal Copia, Papa V Perpetua.
creator: UrFavGhoulette
